acquisition method: the spectra were collected using a data-dependent acquisition method.
cleavage agent: 4 µg trypsin/LysC (Promega, Madison, WI, USA; #V50703) was added to each sample.
enrichment method: phospho-enrichment using subsequent TiO2 and IMAC columns.
fragmentation method: followed by MS2 scans on the most abundant precursors in the Orbitrap at a 50K resolution.
instrument: connected to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer.
